---
title: "Work"
description: "Selected scholarly work, coding projects, presentations, and applied research."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

:::: page-hero
::: eyebrow
Portfolio
:::

# Explore my work.

Browse my research, coding projects, and community engagement.
::::

:::::::::: section-block
## Start by Category

::::::::: {.card-grid .cards-3}
:::: category-card
::: card-kicker
01
:::

### [Research](#research) {#category-research}

Applied research, consulting projects, posters, and publications.
::::

:::: category-card
::: card-kicker
02
:::

### [Coding Projects](#coding-projects) {#category-coding-projects}

AI tools, dashboards, packages, and classwork repositories.
::::

:::: category-card
::: card-kicker
03
:::

### [Community Engagement](#community-engagement) {#category-community-engagement}

Workshops, advocacy, and nonprofit leadership.
::::
:::::::::
::::::::::

::::::::::: section-band
:::::::::: section-block
## Featured Work

::::::::: {.card-grid .cards-3}
:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Research
:::

### [Designed For Impact](work/thesis/designed-for-impact.qmd)

A framework that helps early-career statisticians and data scientists maximize and communicate the impact of their consulting engagements.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Coding Projects
:::

### [LIFT](work/builds/lift.qmd)

An AI-powered operations tool to help a fictitious nonprofit streamline operations, improve reporting, and make more informed resource allocation decisions.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Community Engagement
:::

### [Nonprofit M&A](work/leadership/maritime-integration.qmd)

My work on the organizational restructuring for a historic, eight-figure strategic initiative in the California higher education system.
::::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: section-block
## All Work

### Research {#research}

::::::::::::::::: {.card-grid .cards-3}
:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Thesis
:::

### [Designed For Impact](work/thesis/designed-for-impact.qmd)

A framework that helps early-career statisticians and data scientists maximize and communicate the impact of their consulting engagements.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Consulting
:::

### [Statistical Consulting](work/consulting/statistical-consulting-impact-evaluation.qmd)

A consolidated list of consulting engagements across environmental science, health, human factors, sustainability, and more.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Poster
:::

### [Green Roofs and Environmental Performance](work/posters/green-roofs-environmental-performance.qmd)

Poster project using predictive modeling to assess how green roofs influence building temperatures in urban environments.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Poster
:::

### [Telecommunications Churn Strategy](work/posters/telecom-churn-strategy.qmd)

Poster project using classification models to identify churn risk and translate model results into retention strategy.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Research
:::

### [Political Polling Teaching Article](work/research/chance-literary-digest-poll.qmd)

Journal article revisiting the 1936 *Literary Digest* poll as a teaching context for sampling, bias, and statistical reasoning.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Research
:::

### [Quantitative Social Pressure Theory](work/research/epstein-social-pressure-theory.qmd)

Paper on a quantitative social pressure theory of sexual orientation with a large dataset from multilingual surveys and 92 countries.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Research
:::

### [Complex Instruction and Pair Programming](work/research/theobold-complex-instruction-pair-programming.qmd)

Conference proceedings paper on status, equity, and collaboration using a Complex Instruction-informed pedagogy and pair programming.
::::
:::::::::::::::::

### Coding Projects {#coding-projects}

::::::::::::::::: {.card-grid .cards-3}
:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Build
:::

### [LIFT](work/builds/lift.qmd)

AI-powered operations prototype for nonprofit workflows, reporting, and resource allocation support.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Build
:::

### [dictatR](work/builds/dictatr-r-package.qmd)

R package project containing tools for exploring, visualizing, and analyzing global democracy and dictatorship data.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Build
:::

### [Democracy Dashboard](work/builds/democracy-dashboard.qmd)

Interactive dashboard using survival analysis and geospatial visualization to explore democratic transitions across the globe.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Classwork
:::

### [Statistical Machine Learning Repository](work/repositories/statistical-machine-learning.qmd)

Coursework repository for supervised learning, model assessment, and applied statistical modeling exercises.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Classwork
:::

### [Advanced R Computing Repository](work/repositories/advanced-r-computing.qmd)

Coursework repository focused on R programming, statistical computing, and reproducible workflows.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Classwork
:::

### [Intro to Data Science Repository](work/repositories/intro-data-science.qmd)

Coursework repository for introductory data wrangling, visualization, and modeling projects.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Classwork
:::

### [Data Structures Repository](work/repositories/data-structures.qmd)

Coursework repository for core data structures, algorithmic thinking, and programming fundamentals.
::::
:::::::::::::::::

### Community Engagement {#community-engagement}

::::::::::: {.card-grid .cards-3}
:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Workshop
:::

### [Intro to R & DataFest](work/workshops/datafest-r-presentation.qmd)

Presentation introducing R workflows and practical analysis habits for DataFest participants.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Workshop
:::

### [Data Viz For Nonprofits](work/workshops/data-visualization-nonprofits.qmd)

Workshop on using clear, audience-centered data visuals to communicate nonprofit impact.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Leadership
:::

### [Nonprofit M&A](work/leadership/maritime-integration.qmd)

My work on the organizational restructuring for a historic, eight-figure strategic initiative in the California higher education system.
::::

:::: work-card
::: card-kicker
Advocacy
:::

### [Student Advocacy at Cal Poly](work/advocacy/resolutions.qmd)

Resolutions on institutional growth, course evaluation reform, shared governance, and Academic Senate policy.
::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
